;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;; Example from OpenCog Classic wiki on PLN Backward Chaining
;;; No explicit backward chaining is needed
;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;;
;;; facts
  (= 
    (croaks Fritz) T)
  (= 
    (eat_flies Fritz) T)
;;; Rules
  (= 
    (And T T) T)
  (= 
    (frog $x) 
    (And 
      (croaks $x) 
      (eat_flies $x)))
  (= 
    (green $x) 
    (frog $x))
;;; Conclusion from facts and rules
  !(assertEqual 
    (green Fritz) T)

[

;
;; HYPERON-EXPERIMENTAL-SCRIPTS.B3-DIRECT.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.001000 secs. (999.88 microseconds) 

  !(assertEqual 
    (green Fritz) T)

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (T) 
      (T)))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5506))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqual 
          (green Fritz) T) $_3486) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3762) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3486 $_3790) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_3790)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5506))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqual 
          (green Fritz) T) $_3486) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3762) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3486 $_3790) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_3790)))))
